finance_internal_report.summary: Banking, insurance, wealth, social-card, and internal operating reports. Formal, dense, source-grounded, low-decoration.

government_soe_report.summary: Government, SOE, policy, infrastructure, and formal work reports. Authoritative, restrained, evidence-first.

consulting_analysis.summary: Executive consulting, diagnosis, recommendation, and business review. Conclusion-first, structured, chart-led.

launch_promotion.summary: Product launch, campaign, venue, cultural tourism, and external promotional decks. Visual-first, asset-led.

training_courseware.summary: Training, onboarding, workshop, and teaching decks. Clear modules, examples, practice, and speaker support.
